name: i_sheets_hinglish_connect_and_resume
notes: Hinglish-voice variant of the same real mint + auth-wait-gate pair (sheets_oauth.start_sheets_oauth / sheets_resume.maybe_resume_sheets_onboarding) — proves the connect flow and the honest not-yet-connected floor both work off a natural Hinglish phrasing, not just English. Setup: `setup --onboarded` then `script <tenant> i_sheets_hinglish_connect_and_resume.json`.

steps.message: Bhaiya mera customer aur sales ka sara data Google Sheet mein hai. Kaise jodu isse Viabe se?
steps.note: Hinglish connect-ask — expect the same real authorize_url mint despite the non-English phrasing.

steps.message: Haan, ho gaya, sheet connect kar diya maine
steps.note: Hinglish 'done' tokens (haan/ho/gaya are all in shopify_onboarding._DONE) hit the deterministic auth-wait floor — the gate's honest not-yet-connected line is hardcoded English and must fire verbatim regardless of the owner's language.
